import { codeAnchor, codeAnchorId, ref } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// The satisfies target resolves to no spec: the edge is emitted (the unresolved id is the
// sentinel), the referential-integrity check fails it over the one graph, and no implemented
// fact is conferred — resolution gates the delivery fact.
export const danglingBindingAnchor = codeAnchor({
  id: codeAnchorId("impl:orders.dangling-binding"),
  satisfies: ref("spec:orders.missing-implementation-target"),
});
